summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an evenly solid 1992 show that delivers full, phat sound with all players performing well.
review: The recording is praised as hot, full and phat – a clear, high‑quality soundboard source with no apparent flaws. The performance is described as uniformly good, with every song “well done” and the band moving through the set with professional ease, even if it’s considered an average effort for the era. Jerry’s guitar shines when needed and the keyboards receive special commendation.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers (one detailed five‑star, one brief) convey a strongly positive view of the music and recording; the detailed review rates performance and presentation at 4.5/5, indicating an overall rating in the high‑four range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the audio "pretty damned hot", "full and phat" with no complaints – indicating a crisp, well‑balanced soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Evenly solid performance; every song is described as well done with occasional hotspots, making for an enjoyable but generally average era show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia “gets it up when he needs to” and delivers strong guitar work.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keyboard sound is highlighted as a positive element of the mix.
